data.title: Crypto bettors wager on Zelenskyy’s fate amid Trump row
data.description:
Crypto bettors are now putting wagers on the fate of Ukrainian President Volodymr Zelenskyy after a small row with United States President Donald Trump. Zelenskyy was kicked out of the White House yesterday, with Trump taking to social media to blast him for not being thankful. According to reports from the polygon-based betting platform Polymarket, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-bettors-wager-on-zelenskyy-trump-row/

data.title: Bitcoin price risks correction to $72K as investor sentiment weakens
data.description:
The last time investor sentiment dropped to similar levels was a month after Bitcoin fell to $17,500 in 2022.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-bottom-72k-crypto-investor-sentiment-3-year-low?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin Traders Monitor Key Support Level Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Greeks.live analyst Adam shared insights on X regarding the current sentiment in the cryptocurrency community. The prevailing mood appears bearish, with traders closely watching the $82,000 mark as a crucial support level for Bitcoin. While there is some disagreement within the community, with a minority anticipating a potential price increase in the coming months, the recent sharp decline from $95,000 to $78,000 has led most traders to adopt a cautious stance.

Traders are waiting for Bitcoin's price to stabilize above the monthly opening price, which could signal a potential recovery. Some community members attribute the steep drop to a lack of buying pressure and the expiration of options on February 28.

data.title: Trump Vs Zelensky: Boom Of Meme Coin $TRUMP AND $MAGA
data.description:
The debate between Trump and Zelensky triggered a surge in the $TRUMP and $MAGA coin memes, with increases of 8% and 10% respectively.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/crypto/trump-vs-zelensky-boom-of-meme-coin-trump-and-maga/
